# pull: af pull runs `slicer wt pull <vm> <path>` for a slicer-leased
# workstream, flips lease_state to "pulled", and releases the lease.
#
# Uses a script-local smart slicer fake (at $WORK/myslicer/slicer) that
# records its argv in $WORK/slicer-calls.txt so the exact slicer wt pull
# invocation can be asserted (ADR-065).
#
# Scenarios:
#   1. pull on a held_by_vm lease — succeeds, slicer called, state updated.
#   2. pull again — fails: lease already pulled.
#   3. pull on a session with no lease at all — fails.

env HOME=$WORK/home

# Activate the argv-recording slicer fake ahead of the global echo fake.
chmod 755 myslicer/slicer
env PATH=$WORK/myslicer:$PATH

# ── Scenario 1: pull a held_by_vm lease ───────────────────────────────────────
exec af pull demo
stdout 'pull: demo: pulled commits from VM sbox-abc \(lease released\)'

# The fake slicer must have been invoked with the exact ADR-065 argv.
exists slicer-calls.txt
grep 'wt pull sbox-abc /tmp/worktree-demo' slicer-calls.txt

# state.toml must record the released lease.
grep 'lease_state = "pulled"' $HOME/.local/share/af/v1/sessions/demo/state.toml
grep 'pulled_at' $HOME/.local/share/af/v1/sessions/demo/state.toml

# ── Scenario 2: double pull fails ─────────────────────────────────────────────
! exec af pull demo
stderr 'lease already pulled'

# ── Scenario 3: session without a lease fails ─────────────────────────────────
! exec af pull no-lease
stderr 'no active slicer worktree lease'

# The failing pulls must not have touched slicer again: exactly one call.
exec wc -l slicer-calls.txt
stdout '^\s*1\s'

# ── Fixtures ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

-- home/.local/share/af/v1/sessions/demo/state.toml --
schema_version = 1

[session]
id = "00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001"
name = "demo"
status = "active"
created_at = 2026-05-22T10:00:00Z

[worktree]
path = "/tmp/worktree-demo"
branch = "feat/demo"
base_branch = "main"
repo_slug = "github.com/owner/repo"

[slicer_wt]
vm = "sbox-abc"
path = "/tmp/worktree-demo"
pushed_at = 2026-05-22T11:00:00Z
lease_state = "held_by_vm"

-- home/.local/share/af/v1/sessions/no-lease/state.toml --
schema_version = 1

[session]
id = "00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000002"
name = "no-lease"
status = "active"
created_at = 2026-05-22T10:00:00Z

[worktree]
path = "/tmp/worktree-no-lease"
branch = "feat/no-lease"
base_branch = "main"
repo_slug = "github.com/owner/repo"

-- myslicer/slicer --
#!/bin/sh
# Argv-recording fake slicer for af pull integration tests (ADR-065).
echo "$@" >> "$WORK/slicer-calls.txt"
exit 0
